$curated: Slot bindings for statistics — the FE-side truth for the 5 keyed section-head nodes in statistics.gen.json (each is an MxSectionHeader in the kit; the FE renders it as an MxText.title on the section card root, _StatsCard). `role` is the MxTextRole the FE renders (MxText.title → titleMedium); `bind` is the ARB UI-copy key. Two titles intentionally diverge from the kit mock (documented in intent-ledger, NOT changed here): weekly-head binds statsForecastTitle (the FE maps this section to a due-forecast bar chart, not the kit's time-per-week — no time-per-week source in the domain); heatmap-head binds statsHeatmapTitle (a 12-week activity window vs the kit's 14-week study-calendar). The 2 kit MxCard body nodes (streak-current/longest) are not rendered by the FE (feature gap — ledger `streak`); the overview/accuracy/leitner body blocks and ov-0/1/2 are not keyed (ledger). Only the 5 heads carry a gated text slot.
